testcase.name: testReportFullCompartmentDoesNotDuplicateRequest
testcase.system-out: [13/01/2026 10:01:43] Person 1 has thrown PLASTIC in BIN_1 (id=PLASTIC). Level=1/2 [13/01/2026 10:01:43] Person 2 has thrown PLASTIC in BIN_1 (id=PLASTIC). Level=2/2 [13/01/2026 10:01:43] ALERT: PLASTIC in BIN_1 is now FULL. [13/01/2026 10:01:43] SYSTEM: Single compartment full in BIN_1. Requesting collection. [13/01/2026 10:01:43] SYSTEM: Request received from BIN_1. Sending message to queue. [13/01/2026 10:01:43] Person 3 has thrown GLASS in BIN_1 (id=GLASS). Level=1/2 [13/01/2026 10:01:43] Person 4 has thrown GLASS in BIN_1 (id=GLASS). Level=2/2 [13/01/2026 10:01:43] ALERT: GLASS in BIN_1 is now FULL. [13/01/2026 10:01:43] SYSTEM: Single compartment full in BIN_1. Requesting collection. [13/01/2026 10:01:43] SYSTEM: Request received from BIN_1. Sending message to queue.

testcase.name: testBinBrokenBlocksUsers
